headline: How The Cardinal Health (CAH) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Guidance
summary: Cardinal Health’s model fair value has been fine tuned to US$249.27 from US$248.80, a very small adjustment that keeps the price target effectively in the same range. That modest move sits alongside broadly constructive Street research, where targets have been clustering in the mid US$240s to high US$250s as analysts weigh growth, execution and risk. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative is taking shape and what to watch to stay in step with it. Analyst Price Targets don't...

headline: Can Specialty Momentum Push CAH's Earnings Growth Beyond 25% in FY26?
summary: CAH expects specialty revenues to top $50B in FY26 as its expanding MSO and biopharma services ecosystem helps drive projected EPS growth of 23-26%.
